summary: Public Frantic board health audit for bounty #43 covering the board, ledger, eight current bounty pages/API reads, exact status counts, issue categories, and keep/rewrite recommendations.

observations.rationale: Bounty #43 requires evidence_json observations to include the exact runx --version value.
The public board exposes status counts and current inventory state.
The public ledger returned receipt-backed event rows used as the audit cross-check surface.
At least seven current open/claimed bounty pages and corresponding API reads were covered, exceeding the five-page requirement.
Open since 2026-06-17 and requires a real delayed verifier sequence; add a visible template or stale-date note to reduce mis-execution.
These open paid tasks are over $10 and therefore require standard paid eligibility or one successful paid bounty; the board should surface that gate before workers invest time.
The Sourcey tasks appear intentionally tiered but have overlapping names; cross-links would make progression clear.
Goodwill task with many slots and $0 payout; separate from paid-work discovery so it does not dilute cash-earning filters.
After this claim, the public board projection moved #43 to claimed and showed 0/1 open claim slots, matching the expected state transition.

limitations: A local governed runx receipt could not be produced on this Windows host before delivery because runx 0.6.13 previously hit a Windows receipt-store write failure; this evidence still names the exact observed runx version and public API sources.
